degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Clean all under clean tap water with soft soap. Dry the parts
Ensure that no foreign object gets into the mixers. This may block or damage them

fault_conditions.name: mixer_blockage
fault_conditions.description: Mixer blocked or damaged by foreign objects
fault_conditions.evidence: Ensure that no foreign object gets into the mixers. This may block or damage them

fault_conditions.name: incompatible_grinder_configuration
fault_conditions.description: Powder unit incompatible with 4 grinders option
fault_conditions.evidence: incompatible with the use of 4 grinders option

maintenance_actions.name: mixer_cleaning_disassembly
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: powder residue buildup in mixer components
maintenance_actions.evidence: Separate the mixer (tube, powder chanel, base and cover). Clean all under clean tap water with soft soap. Dry the parts

maintenance_actions.name: powder_container_refill
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the cover(s). Fill with powder. Replace the cover(s)

maintenance_actions.name: dispenser_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: clean with a clean cloth each dispenser

assumptions.statement: Powder unit uses auger or screw-type dispensing mechanism
assumptions.reason: Manual shows internal dispensing mechanism in technical diagram but does not specify exact mechanism type

assumptions.statement: Powder containers have graduated measurement markings
assumptions.reason: Visual diagram shows measurement markings but specific graduations are not detailed in text
